name: What The Farm Podcast - Real life conversations about agriculture and how it affects the consumer's food. From farming to marketing.
description: Weekly conversations between Rob Sharkey and Lesley Kelly about food, agriculture and farming and how it affects the consumer. Topics include public perception, legislature, consumer buying habits, marketing strategies and an explanation of farming techniques.

recent_episodes.title: 223 Chyenne Smith watching the world burn

score_reason: Agriculture and food marketing focus with 100 episodes shows established platform, though consumer education angle may not fit B2B expertise.

key_themes: Agricultural industry perception and public communication
Industry advocacy and defending agricultural practices
enrichment.relevant_episode: Episode 213 Matt Holland marketer — Both Andreas and Matt work in agricultural marketing, making this the closest existing episode to Andreas's wheelhouse of combining marketing expertise with agricultural industry challenges.
enrichment.coverage_gap: How AI and data analytics can help farmers and agricultural brands understand what consumers actually buy (versus what they say they care about) — the podcast focuses heavily on consumer perception and marketing strategy but hasn't explored how technology can bridge the say-do gap in food purchasing decisions.
enrichment.suggested_hook: From Ogilvy to commodity boards: How Andreas used AI to prove what farmers actually need to know about consumer behavior — and why gut instinct is costing the industry millions.
